languages.text: {n}Как только тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас начинают двигаться: Иокаста командует блюстителям осмотреть помещение, ассистенты медикариев начинают суетиться, приводя сектор Бионика в некое подобие порядка.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Как только тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас начинают двигаться: Иокаста командует блюстителям осмотреть помещение, ассистенты медикариев начинают суетиться, приводя сектор Бионика в некое подобие порядка.{/n}

languages.text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Как только тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас начинают двигаться: Иокаста командует блюстителям осмотреть помещение, ассистенты медикариев начинают суетиться, приводя сектор Бионика в некое подобие порядка.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

{n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

{n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

languages.text: {n}体がデッキに触れると、周囲の人たちが動き始める。ザウアーバックは、部屋の検査を強制する。そして、医療隊が動き出し、空間を秩序あるものにする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the space into some semblance of order.{/n}

traits.locale_text: あなたの体がデッキに触れると、周囲の人たちが動き始める。ザウアーバックは、部屋の検査を強制する。そして、医療隊が動き出し、空間を秩序あるものにする。

languages.text: {n}Vücut güverteye değer değmez etrafındaki figürler hareketlenmeye başlıyor. Sauerback, infazcılara odayı incelemelerini emrediyor. Sıhhiye subayları, oraya buraya koşturarak Sektör Biyonika'yı biraz da olsa düzene sokmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vücut güverteye değer değmez etrafındaki figürler hareketlenmeye başlıyor. Sauerback, infazcılara odayı incelemelerini emrediyor. Sıhhiye subayları, oraya buraya koşturarak Sektör Biyonika'yı biraz da olsa düzene sokmaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En cuanto su cuerpo toca la cubierta, las figuras que te rodean empiezan a moverse: Sauerback ordena a los guardias examinar la sala y los oficiales de medicae empiezan a trabajar, restaurando algo parecido al orden en el Sector Bionica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En cuanto su cuerpo toca la cubierta, las figuras que te rodean empiezan a moverse: Sauerback ordena a los guardias examinar la sala y los oficiales de medicae empiezan a trabajar, restaurando algo parecido al orden en el Sector Bionica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}女人的身体刚一触及甲板，周围的人影便行动起来：苏尔贝克指挥着一众执法者检查房间，医务官们也开始忙碌，试图让仿生区恢复几分表面上的秩序。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}女人的身体刚一触及甲板，周围的人影便行动起来：苏尔贝克指挥着一众执法者检查房间，医务官们也开始忙碌，试图让仿生区恢复几分表面上的秩序。{/n}

languages.text: {n}À l'instant où le corps de la femme touche le pont, tout le monde autour de vous se remet à bouger. Sauerback ordonne aux prévôts d'examiner la salle, tandis que les officiers de medicae commencent à s'affairer pour rétablir un semblant d'ordre dans le secteur Bionica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}À l'instant où le corps de la femme touche le pont, tout le monde autour de vous se remet à bouger. Sauerback ordonne aux prévôts d'examiner la salle, tandis que les officiers de medicae commencent à s'affairer pour rétablir un semblant d'ordre dans le secteur Bionica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als der Körper das Deck berührt, kommt Bewegung in die umstehenden Personen: Sauerback befiehlt den Enforcern, den Raum zu untersuchen, und Medicae-Offiziere schwirren umher und beginnen, etwas Ordnung in den Sektor Bionica zu bringen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}As soon as the body touches the deck, the figures around you begin to move: Sauerback commands the enforcers to examine the room, and medicae officers begin to bustle about, bringing the Sector Bionica into some semblance of order.{/n}
